positive: A humorous, stylized illustration of a grumpy badger wearing a tiny pair of reading glasses and sipping tea from a teacup. The background should be simple and clean, allowing for text placement. Style: vintage storybook illustration, cross-hatching, warm muted colors, engraved look.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, bright neon, digital painting, messy
